description: Template for editable fixed-deal evaluations. Use either seed or explicit hands.
card_encoding: Preferred compact token SUIT+VALUE using core-game notation: suits G=Green, E=Acorns, S=Bells, R=Red; values 6,7,8,9,U,O,K,Z(10),A(Ace). Legacy formats are still supported.

cases.notes: Absolute seats P0..P3, each exactly 9 cards, all 36 unique cards.

hands.p0_hand: G6 G7 G8 G9 GU GO GK GZ GS
hands.p1_hand: E6 E7 E8 E9 EU EO EK EZ ES
hands.p2_hand: S6 S7 S8 S9 SU SO SK SZ SA
hands.p3_hand: R6 R7 R8 R9 RU RO RK RZ RA
